name: coderabbit
description: Run AI-assisted code review workflows with the CodeRabbit CLI.

interface.shortDescription: AI-powered code review for explicit and agent-initiated review workflows
interface.longDescription: AI-powered code review using CodeRabbit. Enables developers to implement features, review code, and fix issues in autonomous cycles without manual intervention.
defaultPrompt: Review the current git changes with CodeRabbit and summarize the highest-risk findings.
Compare this branch against main with CodeRabbit and turn findings into a short fix list.
